A web extension to save, manage and restore sessions, windows and tabs.

HorusTabs is a session manager that saves all your open tabs and windows so you can restore them anytime.

Features:
- One-click save & restore — save every open tab, restore them all instantly
- Auto-save & crash recovery — scheduled backups so you never lose tabs
- Tags & search — organize with color-coded tags and full-text search
- Trash bin — deleted sessions are recoverable for up to 90 days
- Tab groups — save and restore Firefox tab groups
- Tab suspender — suspend inactive tabs to free memory
- Import & export — JSON, CSV, or compressed format
- Keyboard shortcuts — fully customizable
- Cloud sync (Pro) — sync sessions across all your devices
- Dark & light themes with accent colors

Your data is safe:
Sessions are stored locally in your browser. Nothing leaves your device unless you enable cloud sync. No tracking, no ads, no lock-in.

Free forever. No account needed. No limits on sessions.

Website: https://horustabs.com

Daily web task tracker with auto-restoration, side panel UI, and task cycles. Bookmark storage. Works offline.

00 UTC | Daily Task Tracker is a Chrome extension that helps you stay productive by tracking and managing your daily web tasks. All your tasks (or links) are stored as bookmarks and automatically reset at midnight UTC or after a custom interval. No external servers or accounts required — everything is local and private.

Features:
- Bookmark-based storage: all tasks live in Chrome bookmarks
- Automatic restoration: tasks reset at 00:00 UTC or after a custom interval
- Quick add: right-click context menu or popup button
- Side panel UI: manage active and completed tasks
- Task cycles: open all tasks sequentially with one click
- Beautiful highlight animations (RoughNotation-inspired)
- Smart banners: reminder when you have pending tasks
- No data collection, no ads, no tracking

How it works:
1. Add any page as a daily task via right-click or popup
2. Reorder your tasks in the side panel by simply dragging and dropping them — the order is saved and used for task cycles
3. For each task, choose when it should return to active: at midnight UTC or after a custom interval
4. Click "Start" to begin your task cycle — each task opens in a new tab, in your chosen order
5. Close the tab when done; the task will be marked as completed, and the next task in your queue will open automatically — repeat until all tasks are completed
6. Completed tasks will automatically return to active at the time you selected, or you can restore them manually from the side panel at any time
A personal internet queue. Save first, organize later — a calm, fast layer between the browser and your attention.

Slate is a modern personal internet queue for people who constantly discover interesting things online but don’t want to manage bookmarks.

Save videos, articles, GitHub repos, Reddit threads, and links instantly — then continue browsing without losing them.

Instead of forcing organization, Slate is built around temporary attention:

save now
revisit later
keep only what matters

Slate feels less like a bookmark manager and more like an extension of your attention.

Interface élégante pour gérer vos favoris et organiser vos onglets en espaces de travail (Travail, Perso, Projets...)

🌐 Favospace Bookmarks - Interface moderne pour vos favoris

Transformez votre page "Nouvel onglet" en une interface élégante et puissante pour gérer tous vos favoris Chrome !

FONCTIONNALITÉS PRINCIPALES :
• Interface intuitive remplaçant la page nouvel onglet pour gerer ses favoris
• Recherche instantanée d'un favori
• Popup de recherche rapide accessible depuis n'importe quelle page web avec le raccourci Alt+Maj+F
• Sauvegarde rapide et restauration des onglets ouverts
• Design moderne et responsive
• Mode sombre/clair

⚡ NOUVEAU dans la version 2.0 : Les espaces de travail !

Organisez vos onglets par projet directement depuis l'icône de l'extension dans la barre d'outils.
Créez des espaces thématiques (Travail, Voyage, Projet perso...) et retrouvez-les en un clic !

Cas d'usage :
• En partance pour un voyage ? Sauvegardez tous vos onglets de préparation dans un espace "Vacances"
• Nouveau projet ? Créez un espace dédié avec toutes vos ressources
• Plus de stress à perdre vos onglets en fermant le navigateur !

Différence avec la sauvegarde rapide :
• Sauvegarde rapide = temporaire, restauration unique
• Espaces = permanents jusqu'à suppression manuelle


GESTION DES ONGLETS :
Besoin de libérer de la mémoire sans perdre vos onglets importants ? Sauvegardez-les en un clic et restaurez-les quand vous le souhaitez ! Parfait pour :
• Pouvoir partir rapidement sans perdre ses onglets
• Libérer de la RAM
• Organiser vos sessions de navigation

POURQUOI CHOISIR FAVOSPACE BOOKMARKS ?
• Aucune collecte de données - 100% local
• Interface française intuitive
• Sauvegarde de vos onglets 
• Gestion complète de vos favoris existants
• Import/export facile depuis le gestionnaire de favoris Chrome
• Synchronisation automatique avec Chrome
• Léger et rapide
• Gratuit pour toujours
• S'améliore dans le temps, sans devenir une usine à gaz ! 

🔒 CONFIDENTIALITÉ :
Vos données restent privées ! L'extension fonctionne entièrement en local et ne transmet aucune information vers des serveurs externes.

Parfait pour organiser et retrouver rapidement vos sites favoris avec style !

One Focus enhances productivity by integrating time management, task tracking, and continuous motivation in a Chrome extension.

# One Focus - 생산성 향상을 위한 통합 타이머 및 할 일 관리

One Focus는 포모도로 기법을 활용한 타이머와 할 일 관리를 결합한 생산성 관리 도구입니다. Chrome 확장 프로그램으로 개발되어 새 탭에서 바로 사용할 수 있으며, 동기부여를 위한 명언과 함께 집중할 수 있는 환경을 제공합니다.

## 주요 기능

### 🕐 스마트 타이머
- 포모도로 기법 기반의 집중 시간 관리
- 실시간 진행률 표시로 남은 시간 시각화

### 📝 할 일 관리
- 드래그 앤 드롭으로 직관적인 순서 변경
- 카테고리 분류로 작업 체계적 관리
- 각 작업에 집중 시간 설정
- 우선순위 관리

### 💡 동기부여
- 매일 새로운 영감을 제공하는 명언 카드
- 한국어/영어 다국어 지원
- 집중을 방해하지 않는 미니멀한 디자인

### 🔧 고급 기능
- Chrome 확장 프로그램으로 새 탭에서 바로 사용
- 로컬 스토리지로 데이터 안전 저장
- 다양한 화면 크기에 최적화된 반응형 디자인
- 눈의 피로를 줄이는 다크 테마

## 사용법

1. **할 일 추가**: "+" 버튼을 클릭하여 새로운 작업을 추가합니다
2. **타이머 시작**: 할 일 목록에서 원하는 작업의 타이머 버튼을 클릭합니다
3. **집중하기**: 설정된 시간 동안 집중하며 작업에 몰입합니다
4. **휴식**: 타이머 완료 후 적절한 휴식을 취합니다

One Focus와 함께 더 나은 생산성을 경험해보세요!

# One Focus - Integrated Timer and Task Management for Enhanced Productivity

One Focus is a productivity management tool that combines the Pomodoro Technique with task management. Developed as a Chrome extension, it's accessible directly from new tabs and provides a focused environment with inspirational quotes for motivation.

## Key Features

### 🕐 Smart Timer
- Focus time management based on the Pomodoro Technique
- Real-time progress display for visual time tracking

### 📝 Task Management
- Intuitive reordering with drag and drop functionality
- Systematic work organization through category classification
- Focus time settings for each task
- Priority management

### 💡 Motivation
- Daily inspirational quote cards for fresh motivation
- Multilingual support (Korean/English)
- Minimalist design that doesn't disrupt focus

### 🔧 Advanced Features
- Chrome extension for immediate access from new tabs
- Secure data storage with local storage
- Responsive design optimized for various screen sizes
- Dark theme to reduce eye strain

## How to Use

1. **Add Tasks**: Click the "+" button to add new tasks
2. **Start Timer**: Click the timer button for your desired task from the task list
3. **Focus**: Concentrate and immerse yourself in work for the set duration
4. **Take a Break**: Rest appropriately after the timer completes

Experience better productivity with One Focus!

AIBookMarks - AI 驱动的浏览器书签管理器

让 AI 帮你整理杂乱的书签，自动分类、智能归档、一键管理。

✨ 核心功能：
• AI 智能分类 — 支持 OpenAI / Claude / Ollama / 自定义API
• 分类规划 — AI 先生成目录方案，确认后再执行
• 新书签自动归类 — 收藏时实时分析，Toast 通知建议归类

🔒 隐私说明：

• 不收集任何用户数据，不包含分析/追踪代码

抓取網頁漫畫的更新、記錄閱讀進度，並以清單呈現。 Scrapes for manga updates, records chapter previously read and displays them in a list.

您是否於多個網站閱讀漫畫或小說，但並不想於每個網站註冊會員? 

那麼此擴充可能很適合您。

漫畫瀏覽器能抓取來自不同網站的漫畫更新，並統一呈現在擴充的清單內。 抓取的內容包含標題、最新章節、更新日期、最後閱讀的章節。

---------------------------------------------
目前支援抓取的網站
---------------------------------------------
  - www.8comic.com
  - manhuagui.com
  (未來將陸續新增，若您有希望能支援的網站，歡迎在留言處留下訊息，或者email開發者)

---------------------------------------------
簡易使用說明
---------------------------------------------
- 若有釘選擴充，瀏覽漫畫的目錄頁面時按下 "+"按鈕，該目錄的網址便會新增進清單中。

- 若進入整頁模式("⌂"按鈕)，複製貼上漫畫目錄頁的網址並按下 "+"按鈕，該網址便會新增進清單中。 

- 開始抓取更新，請按下 "⏵"按鈕。 抓取完成後，若漫畫有新章節，將會排在清單的上方。

- 按下"⚙"來開啟設定，您也可從此處匯入已在書籤中的漫畫目錄頁面。 

---------------------------------English Description---------------------------------
Do you read manga or novels from various websites, but tired of registering memberships?

If so, this extension might be for you.

Manga browser is designed to scrape manga updates from various websites, then display then all in just one list. It scrapes for title, latest chapter, updated date, chapter last read.

---------------------------------------------
Websites currently supported
---------------------------------------------
  - www.8comic.com
  - manhuagui.com
  ( If you want certain website to be supported, feel free to leave a message in the comment section, or email the developer.)

---------------------------------------------
A very brief guide
---------------------------------------------
- If the extension is pinned, when you're on the index page of a manga, click the "+" button, the index page's url will be added to the list.

- If you're in full page mode ("⌂" button), copy and paste the url of a manga index page, then click the "+" button, it will then be added to the list.

- To start scraping for updates, use the "⏵" button. When it's done, manga with new chapter will be at the top of the list.

- Click the "⚙" to access settings, you can also import manga index pages that are already in your bookmark.

Lightning-fast universal launcher. Press ⌘. to instantly search tabs, bookmarks, history, or the web.

Focus Dock: The Ultimate Universal Search & Productivity Launcher

Stop digging through hundreds of tabs. Focus Dock is the fastest Universal Search and Tab Manager for Chrome. Press ⌘+. (Cmd+Period) from any webpage to instantly launch your command center. No signup, no configuration—just pure productivity.

Why Focus Dock is the #1 Productivity Launcher: Our "Zero-Setup" architecture means you are productive the second you install. Whether you need a bookmark manager, a tab search tool, or a quick notes app, Focus Dock handles it all through a single, keyboard-first interface.

🚀 Core Features (100% Free): 

• Instant Universal Search: Find open tabs, bookmarks, and browser history with lightning-fast fuzzy matching (even with typos). 
• Tab Management & Groups: Use /groups to organize your workspace or /autogroup to sort tabs by domain instantly. 
• Quick Notes: Type /note to capture ideas without leaving your current page. • Reading List: Save any article with ⌘+Shift+S and access it later with /read. 
• Workspaces: Save and restore entire tab sessions for different projects using /save. 
• Clipboard History: Access your recently copied links and text using /clip.

⚡ Smart Commands for Power Users: Focus Dock turns your browser into a command line. 
Navigate like a pro with 100% keyboard support: 

• /github — Instantly see all open GitHub tabs. 
• /workspaces — Switch between project sessions. 
• /index — Rebuild your local search index for real-time results.

🔒 Privacy-First Design: 

• Everything Stays Local: Your history, notes, and search data never leave your browser. 
• No Accounts Required: Start using all core features immediately without a login. 
• No Tracking: We believe your browsing data belongs to you.

Free vs. Pro (Flagship Access): Focus Dock is free to use forever with all core features included. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited workspaces, unlimited notes, 100 clipboard history items, and visual tab thumbnails.

Perfect for: 

• Developers managing complex documentation and dozens of tabs. 
• Researchers building a Second Brain and gathering resources. 
• Students switching between multiple project workspaces. 
• Power Users who want to work at the speed of thought.

Stop wasting time switching tabs. Experience the power of a universal browser launcher. Install Focus Dock and press ⌘+. now.

Tmux Tab Groups brings powerful, keyboard-first navigation to your browser tab groups. Inspired by the popular terminal multiplexer tmux, this extension lets you manage tabs using familiar, efficient keyboard shortcuts.

KEY FEATURES:

• Keyboard-First Navigation - Control tabs without reaching for your mouse
• Tmux-Inspired Shortcuts - Use Ctrl+A prefix commands for intuitive control
• Quick Tab Switching - Jump to any tab with number keys (1-9, 0)
• Tab Group Management - Create, organize, and manage groups effortlessly
• Hibernate Groups - Save tab groups as bookmarks for later restoration
• Fuzzy Finder - Quickly search and jump to any group
• Session Persistence - Restore your workspace exactly as you left it

BASIC COMMANDS:

All commands start with Ctrl+A, followed by:
• n/p - Next/Previous tab
• l - Last (previously active) tab
• 1-9, 0 - Jump to specific tab in current group
• c - Create new tab in current group
• g - Create new tab group
• a - Add last tab to current group
• x - Hibernate current group (save to bookmarks)
• f - Open fuzzy finder for quick navigation
• ? - Show help window with all shortcuts

WHO IS THIS FOR?

Perfect for developers, power users, and anyone who values efficiency and keyboard navigation. If you've ever used tmux or prefer keeping your hands on the keyboard, this extension will transform how you manage browser tabs.

PRIVACY & OPEN SOURCE:

This extension does not collect or transmit any data. All tab information stays local on your device. The code is fully open source and available on GitHub.

Get started by pressing Ctrl+A and then ? to see all available shortcuts!

Coro - Command Bar for Custom Commands, Bookmarks, and Search

Description: Coro is a powerful and intuitive Chrome extension that adds a sleek command bar to the top of any webpage, giving users the ability to streamline their browsing experience with ease. With Coro, you can create and manage custom commands, save bookmarks for quick access, and perform searches without leaving your current page with just pressing (CMD/CTRL + Shift + L).

Key Features:
Custom Commands: Create your own commands to automate tasks, trigger actions, or open specific websites. Tailor your browsing experience to fit your workflow.
Bookmarks: Save and access your favorite sites instantly by assigning them custom keywords, turning your command bar into a personalized bookmark manager.
Quick Search: Search the web or specific websites directly from the command bar. Customize search engines or set up site-specific searches for fast and precise results.
Minimal Design: The unobtrusive command bar only appears when you need it, keeping your screen clutter-free while providing powerful functionality at your fingertips.
Why Choose Coro:
Coro turns your browser into a productivity tool by giving you control over your commands and searches, allowing for faster, more efficient navigation. Whether you're a power user looking for shortcuts or someone who just wants easier access to bookmarks, Coro makes browsing smoother and smarter.

Coro: A Command Bar for Everything!

Auto Refresh & Click is a powerful, lightweight Chrome extension that automates page monitoring so you never miss time-sensitive links again.

Why You Need It
Ever found yourself manually refreshing a page over and over, waiting for a specific link to appear — a flash sale, a limited drop, a registration opening, or a reservation slot? Auto Refresh & Click does the work for you. Set it up once, and it watches the page continuously, automatically acting the moment a matching link appears.

What It Does
🔄 Scheduled Auto Refresh
Set any page to refresh at your preferred interval — seconds, minutes, or hours. The timer starts immediately so you don't miss a beat.

🔍 Intelligent Link Monitoring
Define keywords or patterns to watch for in link text. Supports plain text, wildcard (* and ?), full regular expressions, case-sensitive matching, and whole-word matching — the same flexible matching you know from VS Code.

🖱️ Automatic Link Opening
When a matching link is found, it opens in a background tab automatically. Multiple matches? Each opens with a slight random delay to keep your browser smooth. Your current page stays untouched.

📑 Smart Bookmark Integration
Optionally save matched links straight to your bookmarks, organized into keyword-named folders. Built-in global deduplication means no clutter.

🚫 No Repeated Alerts
Already-visited links are remembered and won't trigger again — until you clear the cache.

Key Features
Flexible actions — open links, bookmark them, or both
Real-time match log — see every match and click event as it happens
Light & Dark theme — adapts to your browser automatically
17 languages — auto-detects your browser language (English, 中文, 日本語, 한국어, Français, Deutsch, Español, and more)
Manifest V3 — built on the latest Chrome extension platform for security and performance
Privacy-first — no data collection, no external servers, everything runs locally

Perfect For
Grabbing limited-time deals and flash sales
Monitoring appointment or reservation availability
Watching for new job postings or listings
Tracking restocks on product pages
Any scenario where you need to catch a link the moment it appears

Stop refreshing manually. Let Auto Refresh & Click do it for you.
